popularStory.headline: My 30th Great Grandfather
popularStory.description:
Never did I realize I could trace my lineage to Nobility.  Surprisingly I have 800 years of nobility.
The King of Dublin, Olafr The White

sourceList.title: Geni: Alfred O'Laff, King of Dublin

zh.lifeSummary: 當Olaf Sihtricson於1000年10月1日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林度布林時，他的父親Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublin47歲，母親Slani ingen Briain20歲。他於1015年之前與Maelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathail在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1034年在蘇格蘭享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olaf Sihtricson于1000年10月1日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林度布林时，他的父亲Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublin47岁，母亲Slani ingen Briain20岁。他于1015年之前与Maelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathail在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1034年在苏格兰享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Olaf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements anu ‘ancestor’ + leifr ‘heir, descendant’. St Olaf , King of Norway ( 995–1030 ), aided the spread of Christianity in his kingdom. The name was introduced to Britain before the Norman Conquest, but modern use as a given name in the English-speaking world originated in America, where it was taken by recent Scandinavian immigrants.

en.lifeSummary: When Olaf Sihtricson was born on 1 October 1000, in Dublin, County Dublin, Ireland, his father, Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublin, was 47 and his mother, Slani ingen Briain, was 20. He married Maelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathail before 1015, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1034, in Scotland, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olaf Sihtricson est né le 1 octobre 1000, à Dublin, County Dublin, Irlande, son père, Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublin, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Slani ingen Briain, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Maelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathail avant 1015, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1034, à Écosse, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olaf Sihtricson am 1. Oktober 1000 in Dublin, County Dublin, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublin 47 und seine Mutter Slani ingen Briain 20. Er hat vor 1015 in Irland Maelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1034 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olaf Sihtricson è nato il il 1 ottobre 1000 nel Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublin, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Slani ingen Briain, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Maelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathail prima del 1015, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1034, nel Scotland, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.Dublin, Dublin, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリン
ja.lifeSummary: Olaf Sihtricsonが1000年10月1日にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンダブリンで生まれた時，父Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublinは47歳，母Slani ingen Briainは20歳であった。1015年以前にアイルランドでMaelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathailと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1034年にスコットランドで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Olaf Sihtricson(이)가 1000년 10월 1일 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 드블린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublin(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Slani ingen Briain(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1015년 이전 아일랜드에서 Maelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1034년 스컷랜드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olaf Sihtricson nasceu em 1 de outubro de 1000, em Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, seu pai, Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublin, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Slani ingen Briain, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Maelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathail antes 1015, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1034, em Scotland, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olaf Sihtricson родился 1 октября 1000 г. в местности дублинь, коунти дублинь, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublin было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Slani ingen Briain, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Maelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathail перед 1015 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1034 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olaf Sihtricson nació el 1 de octubre de 1000, en Dublin, County Dublin, Irlanda, su papá, Sigtrygg II "Silkbeard" Olafsson King of Dublin, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Slani ingen Briain, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Maelcorcre Ingen Dunlaing O'Tuathail antes de 1015, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1034, en Scotland, a la edad de 34 años.
